summary: Backend testing for Smart Prosthetic Planner feature completed successfully. All 12 tests passed. Verified: (1) POST /api/procedures/{id}/smart-planner generates report for completed cases, (2) Returns 400 for procedures not in approved Phase 3 status, (3) GET /api/procedures/{id}/smart-planner retrieves stored report, (4) Dentulous case includes retention_guidance and occlusion modules, (5) Report persisted in smart_planner_report field, (6) GET /api/procedures/{id} returns smart_planner_report, (7) Dentulous case with critical space data returns space_analysis module with CRITICAL flags, (8) Full arch case with interarch_space=11 returns MODERATE severity, (9) Full arch case includes material_compatibility and hygiene modules.
critical_code_review_comments: _generate_smart_planner_report function at line 1884 correctly implements two paths: dentulous and full_arch based on FULL_ARCH_SET
Dentulous path generates: space_analysis (with CRITICAL/WARNING/ADEQUATE flags), esthetic_zone (for anterior teeth), retention_guidance, occlusion modules
Full arch path generates: interarch_space (with SEVERE/MODERATE/ADEQUATE severity), material_compatibility, biomechanics, opposing_arch, hygiene modules
POST endpoint at line 2132 validates status in {stage2_surgical_approved, pending_stage2_prosthetic, completed} before generating report
Report correctly stored in smart_planner_report field via MongoDB update at line 2150-2152
GET endpoint at line 2158 returns 404 if report not yet generated
seed_data_creation: Test procedures created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart Planner feature fully tested. Key verifications: (1) Two paths work correctly - dentulous (Single Conventional Implant, etc.) and full_arch (All on 4/6/X), (2) Dentulous modules: space_analysis, esthetic_zone, retention_guidance, occlusion, (3) Full arch modules: interarch_space, material_compatibility, biomechanics, opposing_arch, hygiene, (4) Status validation works - only stage2_surgical_approved, pending_stage2_prosthetic, completed statuses allowed, (5) Report persisted in smart_planner_report field on procedure document, (6) Existing procedure 69cfb036a19e1d1819e0f6fd has status 'completed' and can be used for testing.
verified_features: Backend: POST /api/procedures/{id}/smart-planner generates report for dentulous case (completed status) - returns case_type, modules, alerts, generated_at - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/procedures/{id}/smart-planner returns 400 for procedure not in approved Phase 3 status - VERIFIED
Backend: GET /api/procedures/{id}/smart-planner retrieves stored report - VERIFIED
Backend: Dentulous case report includes retention_guidance and occlusion modules - VERIFIED
Backend: Report is persisted in smart_planner_report field on procedure document - VERIFIED
Backend: GET /api/procedures/{id} returns smart_planner_report when it exists - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/procedures/{id}/smart-planner with space data (occlusocervical_height=5, mesiodistal_space=5) returns space_analysis module with CRITICAL flags - VERIFIED
Backend: Full arch case (All on 4 with available_interarch_space=11) returns interarch_space module with MODERATE severity - VERIFIED
Backend: Full arch case returns material_compatibility and hygiene modules - VERIFIED
